timeline.label: FY2024 Form 990 filed (ProPublica); revenue ~$42.9M, net assets ~$161.9M, net income ~$5.3M
Contract backfill: calculation proofs attached to four additive valuation components
Inaugural Marvin deep dive; Vicki brief for Form 990 PDF harvest

industry.structure: Local cemetery and memorial services with high land and zoning barriers; few public comps; Pinelawn serves Long Island/Nassau-Suffolk.
industry.share_shift: Stable local franchise; competition from other Long Island cemeterers and rising cremation mix industry-wide.
industry.trend: Cremation share rising nationally; land-constrained cemeteries retain pricing power on remaining burial inventory but face long-run mix shift.
